column1: # PRIMARY-SENSE override (hand-curated, high-confidence). Loaded FIRST so these lead BOTH dictionaries —
# the bulk FreeDict sometimes orders a rare/noun sense before the everyday one ("run"->periodo, "drink"->
# bevanda). Bare EN forms (not just "to run") so a bare query "translate run to italian" matches. IT<TAB>EN.
# Keep ONLY translations that are unambiguously the primary everyday sense (a wrong override = a hallucination).
